query: Could you craft a 7-day travel itinerary for a group of three starting in Peoria and planning to visit three different cities within Illinois from March 13th to March 19th, 2022? We have a set budget of $8,400 and require accommodations that allow children under 10.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Peoria to Moline, duration: 1 hour 27 mins, distance: 151 km, cost: 7
plan.attraction: Sylvan Island;Ben Butterworth Parkway;John Deere Pavilion;Celebration River Cruises;Prospect Park;Stephens Park;Sylvan Island Gateway Park;Riverside Park;Millennium Park;Visit Quad Cities - Moline Visitor Center;Wiman/Miss Pattie's Park;Harold's Landing Park;McCandless Park;Rock Island Arsenal Museum;Campbell's Island State Historic Site;Black Hawk State Historic Site;
